     The Numbers Business Report

21 Bridges (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,539,757Details
International Box Office $14,117,874
Worldwide Box Office $42,657,631
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,202,291
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,602,521
Total $4,804,812
Further financial details...

Synopsis

An embattled NYPD detective is thrust into a citywide manhunt for a pair of cop killers after uncovering a massive and unexpected conspiracy. As the night unfolds, lines become blurred on who he is pursuing, and who is in pursuit of him. When the search intensifies, extreme measures are taken to prevent the killers from escaping Manhattan as the authorities close all 21 bridges to prevent any entry or exit from the iconic island.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,261,268 (32.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.08 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$33,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,665 opening theaters/2,665 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $37,261,452

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 22nd, 2019 (Wide) by STX Entertainment
International Releases: November 22nd, 2019 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
November 22nd, 2019 (Wide), released as 21 tiltas (Lithuania)
November 22nd, 2019 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
November 22nd, 2019 (Wide) (Australia)
December 5th, 2019 (Wide), released as 21 МОСТ (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: February 18th, 2020 by Universal Home Entertainment
March 30th, 2020 by Sony Pictures
MPA Rating: R for violence and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2603 (Cert #52300), 11/6/2019)
Running Time: 103 minutes
Geographical setting: New York, New York City
Plot point: Corrupt Cops, Crime, Father’s Footsteps, Manhunt, Narcotics, NYPD, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: AGBO, MWM Studios, H Brothers, STX Films, XCeption Content
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

An embattled NYPD detective is thrust into a citywide manhunt for a pair of cop killers after uncovering a massive and unexpected conspiracy. As the night unfolds, lines become blurred on who he is pursuing, and who is in pursuit of him. When the search intensifies, extreme measures are taken to prevent the killers from escaping Manhattan as the authorities close all 21 bridges to prevent any entry or exit from the iconic island.
